name: U.S. Small Business Administration - Detroit
description_short: U.S. Small Business Administration - Detroit is a credit repair provider based in Detroit, Michigan. Rated 2.9/5 with 24 Google reviews, reflecting limited customer satisfaction.
description_long:
U.S. Small Business Administration - Detroit is a credit repair provider serving clients in Detroit, Michigan. Carrying a 2.9/5.0 Google rating from 24 reviews, U.S. Small Business Administration - Detroit has an limited reputation among consumers in the Detroit area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a loan agency, business development service, business management consultant, U.S. Small Business Administration - Detroit provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Detroit, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. U.S. Small Business Administration - Detroit operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Detroit, Michigan area who are considering U.S. Small Business Administration - Detroit should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
